name: internal
title: GCP Load Balancer — Internal Passthrough Network LB
summary: Creates an internal L4 passthrough load balancer: regional health check, region backend service (INTERNAL scheme), and forwarding rule with optional static IP, all-ports mode, and global access.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory labels.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' label where supported (lowercased).

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' label where supported (lowercased).

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional labels merged beneath the mandatory label set (lowercased).

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: project_id
module.description: GCP project ID hosting the load balancer.

module.name: region
module.description: Region of the internal load balancer and its backend service.

module.name: network_self_link
module.description: Self-link of the VPC network. Supplied as a plain value — no framework dependency is implied.

module.name: subnet_self_link
module.description: Self-link of the subnet hosting the forwarding-rule IP.

module.name: ip_address
module.description: Static internal IP for the forwarding rule. Null = ephemeral from the subnet range.

module.name: ports
module.description: Ports the forwarding rule accepts (max 5), or empty with all_ports = true.

module.name: all_ports
module.description: Forward all ports (mutually exclusive with ports).

module.name: allow_global_access
module.description: Allow clients from any region of the VPC (not just the LB region) to reach the ILB.

module.name: backend_groups
module.type: map(object({ group = string balancing_mode = optional(string, "CONNECTION") failover = optional(bool, false) }))
module.description: Backend instance groups / NEGs keyed by logical name. Group lifecycle (MIGs, NEGs) is the consumer's responsibility.

module.name: health_check
module.type: object({ port = number protocol = optional(string, "TCP") request_path = optional(string, "/") check_interval_sec = optional(number, 5) timeout_sec = optional(number, 5) healthy_threshold = optional(number, 2) unhealthy_threshold = optional(number, 2) })
module.description: Health check configuration for the backend service.

module.name: session_affinity
module.description: Session affinity: NONE, CLIENT_IP, CLIENT_IP_PROTO, or CLIENT_IP_PORT_PROTO.

outputs.name: lb_id
outputs.description: ID of the forwarding rule (the ILB frontend).

outputs.name: lb_address
outputs.description: Internal IP address of the load balancer.

outputs.name: listener_ids
outputs.description: Map with single key 'forwarding_rule' to the forwarding rule self-link (GCP's analogue of a listener).

outputs.name: backend_ids
outputs.description: Map with single key 'backend_service' to the region backend service ID.

outputs.name: health_check_id
outputs.description: ID of the regional health check.
